prompt: Create a realistic, high-end lifestyle mirror selfie photograph of an adult woman lounging sideways on a modern beige sofa in a warm minimalist living room. She has short dark brown chin-length bob hair and a slim figure, reclining with her upper body propped against the left sofa arm, one hand resting on the cushion and the other holding a dark smartphone in front of her face; her face is intentionally hidden by a plain rectangular privacy blur/censor block. She wears a fitted white ribbed long-sleeve turtleneck cropped top and a brown gray plaid mini skirt, with bare legs extended diagonally across the sofa toward the right side of the frame. Compose the image in a wide horizontal 16:9 aspect ratio, full-body from head to toes, slightly low eye-level perspective, casual elegant pose, natural anatomy, soft skin texture, realistic fabric folds. The room has beige plaster walls, a cream sofa with square arms and a matching throw pillow, a black dome table lamp glowing warmly on a dark side table at the far left, wooden flooring, and a tall sculptural gray ceramic vase with delicate leafy branches on the far right. Use warm ambient lighting with soft shadows, cozy evening atmosphere, shallow depth of field, muted neutral palette, editorial interior photography style, ultra-realistic detail, no visible text, no extra people, no distorted hands or feet.
